title: Jianghai Yu Tong: Ju Gui Qi Yuan

alternative_titles.en: A Fishboy's Story: Tortoise from the Sea

synopsis:
The story tells of an unscrupulous merchant, Boss Wan, who plots to seize a prosperous fishing village and places a treacherous net in the sea. A young fisherman named Manjiang thwarts his scheme… "A small story, a profound lesson," the entire tale interprets the unique customs and emotional expressions of people living along the river and sea, as well as their frugal, diligent, peaceful, and dedicated lifestyle.

(Source: Tencent, translated)
